utility_plugins.description: Tools that paint or edit simulation (SIM) textures directly onto clothing meshes inside VaM to fix clipping, control drape, and improve fit on non-base or morphed bodies.
Plugins for visualizing clothing/skin meshes, performing rewraps, editing base mesh sim cloth data, and assisting clothing creation/import workflows.
Physics correction and optimization tools that detect unstable dynamics on Person atoms, apply fixes, auto-stabilize, and improve realism/stability for clothing and bodies.
Plugins that extend VaM's interface with quick-access buttons, performance monitors, active editors (e.g. clothing), workflow tools, and session enhancements.
examples: UI Assist by JayJayWon (free and patron versions)

utility_plugins.description: Core animation creation, editing, and playback plugin used as a utility for building and controlling complex motions across scenes.
Utilities for capturing higher-resolution screenshots, supersampled renders, or enhanced stills beyond default VaM output.
Real-time post-processing tools adding bloom, depth of field, anti-aliasing, and other visual enhancements directly in VaM.
Camera and immersion enhancements specifically for point-of-view (POV) or custom first-person perspectives.
Tools for quickly changing, applying outfits, or managing textures on existing clothing items without external software.
Utilities that scan loaded scenes for missing .var dependencies and assist with locating, downloading, or managing required packages.
Specialized fixes targeting common clipping problems such as nipples through clothing or body intersections.
Mesh smoothing tools that reduce visible polygon edges and improve body appearance under close-up or specific lighting.
Targeted fixes for common morph issues on eyes, jaw, irises, or other facial/body morphs in custom looks.
Systems that add favorite tagging, quick filtering, and library management for clothing and hair items.
Tools that convert dynamic/simulated clothing into static meshes parented to body nodes for performance or specific use cases.
Command-line or automated utilities that keep installed addons, plugins, and packages updated to latest versions.
Simple recording utilities for capturing physics simulations, motions, or dynamic interactions.
Tools and presets for managing, auto-loading, and organizing session plugins across multiple scenes or VaM sessions.
Eye-tracking and gaze direction plugins for realistic eye movement, focus, and interaction responses.
First-person VR embodiment and comfort plugins that improve presence, body ownership, and reduce motion discomfort in VR.
Plugins for static posing, pose loading/saving, IK targeting, solvers, and pose management, distinct from full Timeline animation tools.
Audio playback utilities with driven lipsync, mouth animation, and audio file management for character performance.
Plugins for state machines, conditional behaviors, logic bricks, and advanced trigger systems beyond core VaM triggers.
Tools for painting decals, tattoos, or custom textures directly onto body/skin meshes.
Plugins for controlling and animating blendshapes on CustomUnityAsset objects within VaM scenes.

General-purpose editors for CustomUnityAsset and light properties: scale, layers, shadows, material colors, alpha, emission, render settings, culling masks. Distinct from `post-processing-effects` which operates at the camera level.
Plugins for applying selective alpha masks to Person body parts (face, torso, limbs, genitals) to achieve transparency or skin-hiding effects.
Advanced controllers and helpers for genital physics (male, female, futa) including alignment, thrusting simulation, anus and labia morph automation, and related animation aids.
Specialized plugins for blowjob, deepthroat, or other oral-act animation, often with integrated audio and moan support.
Plugins that rotate or move objects to continuously face, follow, or align with target objects. Distinct from `pose-ik-helper` which targets character IK; this is general object aiming/parenting.
Plugins for rendering VR-format output (VR180, VR360, stereo 3D) and motion-capture export. Distinct from `high-res-screenshot` which produces flat stills.

location_scenes.description: Bedroom and apartment residential sleeping or living spaces primarily intended as reusable backdrops.
examples: various modular bedroom and apartment environment packs

location_scenes.description: Modular room systems with customizable walls, doors, windows, multiple sizes, and texture variants for building custom reusable backdrops.
examples: 3m/4m/6m modular room packs with doorway and window variants

location_scenes.description: Bathroom and public restroom environments designed for reuse as scene backdrops.
Forest, woodland, oasis, and other natural environments (water features treated as a common property rather than separate category) for backdrop reuse.
Casino, nightclub, and other adult entertainment venue environments with props for reusable backdrops.
examples: VaM Casino 69 Environment and Prop Assets

location_scenes.description: Beach, coastal, or seaside paradise environments intended for reuse as backdrops.
examples: Costa del Sol beach environment packs

location_scenes.description: Moon, orbital, or futuristic sci-fi environments primarily for backdrop reuse.
Medical observation, clinical, or laboratory room environments for reusable backdrops.
Fantasy throne rooms, castles, or regal interior environments for backdrop reuse.
examples: Throne room environment examples and packs

location_scenes.description: Diner, cafe, or casual commercial interior environments for backdrop reuse.
Anime or stylized character-themed room environments for backdrop reuse.
Ancient ruins, decayed structures, or outdoor historical environments for backdrop reuse.
Specialized adult commercial or store-style environments for backdrop reuse.
Office, executive, or professional workspace environments for backdrop reuse.
Car, plane, train, or other vehicle interior environments for reusable backdrops.
Full residential building or multi-room house environments intended as reusable backdrops, distinct from `indoor-bedroom` or `indoor-bathroom`.

Specialized room environments oriented around a narrative roleplay scenario where the room's purpose drives the scene type (interrogation room, courtroom, exam room, classroom, etc.). Use as a fallback for narrative-distinct rooms not covered by a more specific tag like `medical-lab` or `school-classroom`.

speculative.description: Hair physics, styling, editor, or fix tools separate from general clothing utilities.
speculative.reason_speculative: Frequently discussed in VaM hair import and customization threads, but no specific 2+ named real packages with exact titles confirmed without invention.

speculative.description: Utilities for easy Person atom spawning, multi-actor scene composition, and group management.
speculative.reason_speculative: Widely needed for multi-character scenes and discussed in creator communities, but no specific 2+ named real packages confirmed with verifiable titles.

speculative.description: Plugins for advanced facial expressions, emotion triggers, and real-time facial animation control.
speculative.reason_speculative: Common in performance and animation workflows alongside Timeline, but no specific 2+ named real packages confirmed with verifiable titles.
